mechanism_name: Bidentate κ²-O,O chelation under iodide ligation
key_BE_evidence_kcal_mol: Survives only at Cu2I2 (−17.86, intact); collapses at CuI (to methoxy-O monodentate); fragments cluster from phO start at Cu2I2; FAILED_SCF on [CuI2]−
scope_caveat: Only one cluster level (Cu2I2) supports bidentate without artifacts; larger CuI clusters (e.g. Cu4I4) untested

verdict: PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED (state-dependent: bidentate kappa^2-O,O productive on neutral Cu2I2; mono-OMe on iodide-saturated [CuI2]- nonproductive)
key_BE_evidence_kcal_mol: Productive at naked-Cu+ (cu_anisole_methoxyO -48.78 / -20.54 SMD); weak at CuI (cui_guaiacol_methoxyO -14.23, weakest O-donor); non-physical SCF in original Set D for cu2i2 + cui2 anion guaiacol cases (+172.67 / +173.15). Task #29 V2 RESCUES claim 3 on Cu2I2 with the bidentate veratrole minimum: cu2i2_veratrole_methoxyO_startA BE_gas = -26.82, BE_smd = -26.24 (Cu-O 2.203 A x 2, n_imag=0). [CuI2]- veratrole alternates remain endothermic +48 to +55 (E3.7, E3.8).
scope_caveat: Productivity requires neutral CuI cluster + adjacent O,O donor geometry (here: 1,2-dimethoxy on veratrole). Single mono-OMe contacts remain metastable on Cu2I2. Bidentate basin needs rotamer scan + Grid5/FinalGrid6 single-point to confirm robustness.

verdict: PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED (substrate-dependent: veratrole pi minimum -23.1 kcal/mol survives; guaiacol/phenol pi-starts collapse to detached)
key_BE_evidence_kcal_mol: cu2i2_guaiacol_pi -15.53 (DETACHED, Cu-O >= 3.75 A); cu2i2_phenol_pi -16.73 (DETACHED, Cu-O 4.76 A); cu2i2_veratrole_pi BE_gas = -22.98, BE_smd = -23.11, n_imag=0 (TRUE eta^n-arene minimum, E4.3 SUPPORTED 2026-04-30 via Task #29 V2). Veratrole's two adjacent -OMe substituents stabilise the pi mode where free phenolic guaiacol/phenol cannot. DUAL-MODE NOTE: on the SAME Cu2I2 + veratrole complex, an alternate kappa^2-O,O bidentate seed (cu2i2_veratrole_methoxyO_startA, BELEGEN E3.5) gives BE_smd = -26.24, slightly more binding than the pi channel by ~3 kcal/mol. Both channels are viable on Cu2I2 + veratrole.
scope_caveat: pi-mode is substrate-dependent on Cu2I2: etherified veratrole binds, free phenolic guaiacol/phenol do not. Manuscript wording must say 'etherified guaiacyl/veratrole motifs bind via pi on neutral Cu2I2', not 'aromatic substrates bind via pi'. Other etherified substrates (e.g. beta-O-4 fragments) untested.

key_BE_evidence_kcal_mol: Rhombic Cu2I2 dimerisation BE −51.90 (n_imag=0); 35.5 kcal/mol more stable than linear isomer (n_imag=2 SADDLE); productive ligand binding for h2o / methanol / guaiacol-bidentate (BE −15 to −19, all intact, all n_imag=0)
scope_caveat: Demonstrated for small-donor + chelate set only; broader donor diversity (anionic / N-donor) untested

mechanism_name: Mode-selective CuI anchoring as overall thesis
verdict: PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED (CuI level only; weakens monotonically with iodide ligation)
key_BE_evidence_kcal_mol: At naked-Cu+: π/O gap = 33.7 kcal/mol. At CuI: π −56.69 (phenol), −29.04 (guaiacol-π v9.1) > O −25.76 (methanol) ~ −25.30 (guaiacol-phO) > methoxy-O −14.23; π/O gap shrinks to 3.74 kcal/mol. At Cu2I2: BE spread ~4 kcal/mol; π modes collapse. At [CuI2]−: all detached.
scope_caveat: Mode-selectivity is real at the CuI monomer level but cluster-state-dependent. Manuscript wording should restrict the claim to the CuI level rather than 'across cluster states'.
